---
title: "Exploratory Data Analysis"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
---

```{=html}
<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=../../analysis/eda-2/eda-2.html">
<p style="margin-top:2rem;font-size:1.1rem;">
  Opening EDA report&hellip;
  <a href="../../analysis/eda-2/eda-2.html">Click here if not redirected automatically.</a>
</p>
```
